results.title: 01 time freezes outside
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Image 1 controls Tina, wardrobe, product, and real car continuity. Image 2 supports her face and the gummy only. Create a new cinematic view just after the bite. Tina and her moving car are the only things continuing through time. Outside the passenger window, an ordinary neighborhood is frozen at one vivid instant: sprinkler water suspended as individual glasslike beads, a skateboarder motionless in midair, birds stopped between wingbeats, windblown leaves hanging in space. Tina notices calmly. Make frozen motion and moving car simultaneously readable through photographic depth and motion cues. No tropical world, miniatures, or parachute.

Preserve her identity and the product, but obey each prompt's new composition and creative situation. Every job is an independent idea after Tina eats the candy; it does not need to preserve the car-peel, parachute, tropical, miniature, or gummy-fish ideas from other rounds. results.title: 02 gravity turns sideways
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Preserve Tina's identity, wardrobe, gummy, pouch, and normal level rear seat from the references, but allow a wider camera. Gravity outside has rotated ninety degrees. Parked cars, people, trees, bicycles, and lawn furniture fall calmly sideways up the face of the blue sky while the houses cling to a suburban street that now appears vertical. Inside the car, Tina and the gummy remain level and serene. Lucid daylight impossible physics, playful rather than catastrophic. No injuries, storm, tropical fantasy, or parachute.

results.title: 03 giant tina looks inside
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Use both references for Tina's exact face, hair, blue jacket, black top, gummy, and pouch. Create a wide exterior view of the normal dark car stopped on an ordinary neighborhood street. An enormous gentle duplicate of Tina kneels outside and peers curiously through the rear passenger window at normal-sized Tina holding the candy inside. The two Tinas clearly recognize one another. Precise playful forced-scale photography, warm afternoon light, deadpan wonder. No giant disembodied hand, destruction, candyland, or horror.

results.title: 04 three tinas three choices
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Preserve Tina's identity and clothing in all repetitions. Create one continuous impossible car interior, not panels or split screen. The rear seat has widened to hold exactly three identical Tinas side by side at the same moment of choice. The first carefully peels the lychee gummy, the second bites it whole, and the third holds it to the window light. Each action produces a distinct restrained atmosphere around that Tina while the upholstery and perspective remain one coherent physical space. Elegant live-action multiplicity, no extra unrelated people.

results.title: 05 tina redraws live action

results.title: 06 city inside the gummy
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Both images support Tina, the product, and car setting, but create an extreme photographic macro. Tina holds one translucent pink lychee gummy close to the lens and peers through it. Within the gummy itself is a vast complete luminous city following its curved fruit surface, with a tiny version of Tina's dark car driving along a street inside. Her magnified eye and the real car interior remain visible beyond the candy. Nested scale must read without a glowing portal ring. Make the gummy appetizing, translucent, and materially specific.

results.title: 07 neighborhood peels everything
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Preserve Tina in the rear seat with gummy and pouch, watching through the window. Create a wider view of an otherwise ordinary neighborhood where everyone calmly peels the outer surface from everyday things as if they learned the candy's behavior. One woman peels a mailbox to reveal polished chrome, one child peels a lawn into a bright patterned floor, and a delivery driver peels the side of a house into saturated color. Deadpan social surrealism with three readable actions, benign and orderly, no destruction, giant fruit, jungle, or candyland.

results.title: 09 street becomes accordion
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Use the references for Tina, product, and dark car continuity but create a wide exterior music-video composition. After the bite, the suburban street ahead has physically folded into a giant architectural accordion. Rows of real houses compress and expand in rhythmic pleats, the road bends into bellows, and streetlights become oversized keys. Tina's car rides one moving fold. Bold practical production design, geometric and joyful, no musicians, printed notes, tropical transformation, or candyland.

results.title: 10 shadows escape first
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Preserve Tina, gummy, pouch, rear seat, and ordinary neighborhood. In long late-afternoon light, every physical object remains normal but its shadow has detached and begun behaving independently. A hydrant's shadow gallops like an animal, a bicycle's shadow becomes a bird and flies across a wall, tree shadows dance down the sidewalk, and Tina's own shadow reaches toward the gummy while she watches. Poetic photographic surrealism, playful not sinister. No dark monsters, tropical world, or full object transformation.

results.title: 11 world drops away
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Preserve Tina, product, and the intact dark rear seat, but create a clean hero wide shot.
